title: SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 5C Cheat Sheet
printNote: Quick reference for SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 5C in SQL & Databases.

entries.syntax: -- SQL Database query for SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 5C
entries.example:
-- SQL Database query for SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 5C
SELECT id, title, category, created_at
FROM application_records
WHERE category = 'SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 5C' AND is_active = 1
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
entries.description: Basic syntax for SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 5C
